_note: Hand-authored stub. The original publish run did not emit a dogfood-results.json artifact. Counts under wiring_check and dead_flags reflect real grep-derived measurements of the shipped source; all other sub-checks are marked skipped rather than fabricated. Replace with the real artifact on the next /printing-press-publish airframe run.

path_check.detail: plan-driven spec: no live endpoint paths to validate

auth_check.detail: airframe is keyless (no auth scheme); CLI advertises auth_type=none

dead_flags.detail: grep-counted Flag/PersistentFlag declarations under internal/cli/*.go; reachability not verified in this stub

dead_functions.detail: skipped: real dead-code analysis requires the dogfood binary

pipeline_check.detail: sync (faa.go, ntsb.go) writes into aircraft/make_model/engine/dereg/events/event_aircraft/narratives via store; tail/owner/model/event/search read from the same tables

example_check.detail: skipped: stub did not parse per-command cobra Example blocks

command_tree.detail: newXxxCmd constructors vs. AddCommand call sites; both counted at 9 (doctor, event, flight, model, owner, root, search, sync, tail)

config_consistency.detail: single rootFlags shape; persistent flags --json, --select, --db-path consumed via package-level globals

novel_features_check.detail: manifest novel_features count matches AddCommand count

mcp_surface_parity.detail: manifest declares mcp_tool_count=9; runtime parity not re-verified in this stub

test_presence.detail: internal/ingest/{faa_test,ntsb_test}.go and internal/store/store_test.go present and passing
